page.title: Agent Groups
page.subtitle: Create reusable teams from persistent SubAgent presets for collaborative runs.

form.initialRecipientsHint: Members that receive the first task message.
form.principlesNote: Applied as short operating rules shared with every group member.
form.principlesExample: Example: Principles = ["State assumptions", "Flag disagreement", "Prefer concrete file references"]. Each member sees these as collaboration rules before responding.
form.collaborationPromptNote: Injected into the group run prompt to shape how members coordinate.
form.collaborationPromptExample: Example: "Planner proposes the implementation order, reviewer challenges risks, and all final opinions must include unresolved blockers." This is added to the run prompt for the whole group.
form.summaryIncludePrivate: Include private member transcripts in summary

empty.title: No Agent Group Presets
empty.subtitle: Add a preset to define a collaborative team.

messages.loadConfigFailed: Failed to load agent group config
messages.unsavedChangesNotice: You have unsaved changes on this page. Save before leaving.
messages.unsavedChangesLeaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leaving will discard them. Continue?
messages.unsavedChangesReloadConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Reloading will discard them. Continue?
messages.presetNameMissing: An agent group preset is missing a name
messages.presetNameInvalid: Invalid preset name: use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores, starting with a letter
messages.memberNameMissing: A member in {preset} is missing a name
messages.memberPresetMissing: Member {member} in {preset} has no SubAgent preset selected
messages.memberPersonaMissing: Member {member} in {preset} has no Persona selected
messages.initialRecipientInvalid: Initial recipient {name} in {preset} is not an enabled member
